title: DupeFix Project
description: A mod to fix some Dupe Bugs.
body:
# 💎 DupeFix Project 💎 

DupeFix Project is a mod made for Minecraft 1.12.2 that fixes dupes in other mods.

The reason this mod exists is to fix as many dupes as possible so that modpacks and servers can take advantage of several mods without having to ban items from them.

Most mods here are either no longer updated, or no longer receive updates for Minecraft 1.12.2. So to keep them usable on modpacks and servers, this mod was created.

### My game is crashing on startup, what do I do?

It could be an incompatibility of the Mixin version with other mods you have installed. Please try to install [Mixin 0.7-0.8 Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixincompat) to prevent this from happening.

If the crash persists, please open an issue on GitHub.

### Which dupes this mod fixes?

At the moment, this mod fixes the following Dupe Bugs:

#### Vanilla
Donkey Dupe Bug
Cow Dupe Bug

#### Blood Magic[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-magic)
Sigil of Holding Dupe Bug
Sentient Armor Dupe Bug

#### Botania[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)
Virus Donkey Dupe Bug

#### Project Red: World[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-red-exploration)
Backpack Dupe Bug

#### Spice of Life[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-spice-of-life)
Lunch Bag/Box Dupe Bug

#### Tinkers' Construct[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)
Tool Forge Dupe Bug

#### Thaumcraft[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)
Arcane Workbench Dupe Bug
Primordial Pearl Dupe Bug
Collector Infusion Enchantment Dupe Bug
Arcane Stone Dupe Bug
Multiplayer Arcane Workbench Dupe Bug
Magic Mirror Dupe Bug
Thaumcraft Entities Drops Dupe Bug

#### Thaumic Wonders[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumic-wonders)
Flying Carpet Dupe Bug

#### Tiny Progressions[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tiny-progressions)
Big Pouch Dupe Bug

#### Mekanism[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
Personal Chest Dupe Bug
Bin Dupe Bug

#### Nether Chest[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nether-chest)
Unstackable Items Dupe Bug
 
#### Industrial Foregoing[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing)
Conveyor Belt Dupe Bug

#### Extra Utilities[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-utilities)
Machine Container Dupe Bug

#### Actually Additions[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/actually-additions)
Shulker Box Dupe Bug

#### The Farlanders[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farlanders)
Looter Thorns Enchantment Dupe Bug

#### Forestry[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forestry)
Backpack Dupe Bug

#### Thermal Expansion[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thermal-expansion)
Satchel Dupe Bug
Cache Dupe Bug

#### Arcane Archives[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arcane-archives)
Radiant Crafting Table Dupe Bug
Containers Dupe Bug

#### Tinkers' Complement[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-complement)
Chisel Dupe Bug

#### Industrial Craft 2[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-craft)
Industrial Crafter Dupe Bug

#### Quark[[Modrinth]](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
Pickarang Dupe Bug

#### Iron Backpacks[[CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-backpacks)
Recipe Dupe Bug
Swap Dupe Bug
